section.title: AI Use Across Project Phases
section.description: This section focuses on the Project Management Focus Areas (similar to process groups). For each project phase below, indicate how often you use AI tools.

questions.text: For each project phase below, indicate how often you use AI tools to assist with the activities in that phase.
questions.hint: Select one option per row that best represents your frequency of AI use in that phase.

rows.label: **Initiating**
rows.description: Defining a new project or phase; establishing project vision and alignment

rows.label: **Planning**
rows.description: Establishing scope, objectives, and actions; developing project plans, estimates, and risk responses

rows.label: **Executing**
rows.description: Performing the work as defined in the plan; managing teams, stakeholders, and resources during execution

rows.label: **Monitoring & Controlling**
rows.description: Tracking progress, reviewing performance, managing changes to ensure alignment with plan

rows.label: **Closing**
rows.description: Finalizing all activities, completing deliverables, lessons learned, and project closure tasks
